briefdescription.para: Do not emit cursor or clear-screen control sequences automatically.
Clear the full screen before rendering the next frame.
Move the cursor to the top-left corner before rendering the next frame.
Screen clearing strategy used between rendered frames.
Callback invoked when the terminal size changes or is initialized.
Create a new terminal instance.

parameterdescription.para: The fallback terminal size used when automatic detection is unavailable.

briefdescription.para: Get the currently configured or detected terminal size.
Access the input interface.

simplesect.para: The platform-specific input backend owned by this terminal.

briefdescription.para: Get the refresh mode.
Test if colors are enabled.
Check whether dynamic terminal size detection is enabled.
Check whether line buffering is enabled for incremental writes.

simplesect.para: true if text output is collected until a newline or flush().

briefdescription.para: Check whether the optional back buffer is enabled for smart overwrite updates.

simplesect.para: true if updateScreen() keeps the previous rendered frame for diff-based updates.

briefdescription.para: Modify the size of the terminal.

detaileddescription.para:
If the terminal is not yet initialized, the size will be set when initializeScreen() is called. This method is only used when the terminal size is manually set. If size detection is enabled, the terminal size will be automatically detected and updated.
size
The new terminal size.

briefdescription.para: Set if dynamic terminal size detection is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable automatic size detection.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable line buffering for incremental writes.

detaileddescription.para:
When enabled, output is accumulated until a newline or flush() is reached.
enabled
true to enable buffered writes.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the optional back buffer used by smart overwrite updates.

detaileddescription.para:
Enabling the back buffer forces the next updateScreen() call to redraw the full frame once.
enabled
true to enable the back buffer.

briefdescription.para: Set a callback called when a detected terminal size is submitted.

parameterdescription.para: The callback invoked from initializeScreen() and testScreenSize().

briefdescription.para: Set if colors are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: true to emit ANSI color and cursor control sequences.

briefdescription.para: Set the refresh mode.

parameterdescription.para: The screen refresh strategy to use.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the console once before the application starts.

detaileddescription.para: Applies platform-specific setup, optionally clears the screen, and submits the initial size.

briefdescription.para: Detect terminal resize changes and submit them through the callback.
Clear the screen before a new one is displayed.

detaileddescription.para: The emitted control sequence depends on the configured refresh mode.

briefdescription.para: Restore terminal settings when the application is quit.
Get the current color.

simplesect.para: The currently tracked terminal color state.

briefdescription.para: Set foreground and background color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set foreground and background color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set the foreground color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set the background color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set the terminal default foreground and background colors.
Move the cursor to the left.

parameterdescription.para: The number of terminal cells to move.

briefdescription.para: Flush the buffer.
Render a buffer onto the terminal.

detaileddescription.para:
The buffer is clipped to the visible area of the terminal and optionally annotated with crop marks. If the terminal is smaller than the configured minimum size, only the minimum-size marker is rendered.
buffer
The buffer to render.
settings
Additional rendering settings for crop marks and minimum terminal size handling.

briefdescription.para: Write a character to the console.
Write a string to the console.
Write text to the console.

detaileddescription.para:
Please use print and printLine for the high-level API.
text
The text to display.

briefdescription.para: Write a buffer to the console.

detaileddescription.para:
This will not perform any additional formatting, clipping, or processing. Each line of the buffer will be written to the console.
For interactive apps, use updateScreen.
buffer
The buffer to write.

briefdescription.para: Add a line-break.
Print elements on the screen.
Print elements on the screen adding a line break.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Buffer &buffer, Size terminalSize, const UpdateSettings &settings) noexcept -> Size
memberdef.name: renderedFrameSize

memberdef.argsstring: (const Buffer &buffer, Size terminalSize, const UpdateSettings &settings, Position pos)
memberdef.name: getCropped

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string &output, const Buffer &buffer, Size terminalSize, const UpdateSettings &settings) const noexcept
memberdef.name: appendFullFrameOutput

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string &output, const Buffer &previousFrame, const Buffer &buffer, Size terminalSize, const UpdateSettings &settings) const noexcept
memberdef.name: appendDiffFrameOutput

memberdef.argsstring: (const Buffer &buffer, Size terminalSize, const UpdateSettings &settings) noexcept
memberdef.name: updateBackBuffer

memberdef.argsstring: (const Buffer &previousFrame, const Buffer &buffer, Size terminalSize, const UpdateSettings &settings) const noexcept -> int
memberdef.name: changedCharacterCount

briefdescription.para: High-level terminal interface for screen control, color output, and key input.
